Reference

CSS classes reference.

Quick lookup for all supported classes in the library.

On this page

  • Symbol types
  • Modifier classes

Symbol types

Apply one of these classes alongside sbolv to choose the symbol shape.

Class Preview
assembly-scar
blunt-restriction-site
cds
engineered-region
five-prime-overhang
five-prime-sticky-restriction-site
insulator
operator
origin-of-replication
poly-a-site
primer-binding-site
promoter
protease-site
protein-stability-element
restriction-enzyme-recognition-site
ribonuclease-site
ribosome-entry-site
rna-stability-element
signature
stop-codon
terminator
three-prime-overhang
three-prime-sticky-restriction-site
user-defined

Modifier classes

These classes can be combined with sbolv or sbol-visual to alter rendering behaviour.

Class Applies to Effect
centeredsbol-visualCenters wrapped lines within the container.
inlinesbolv, sbol-visualRenders the symbol(s) inline, vertically aligned with surrounding text.
antisensesbolv, sbol-visual, inner label elementMirrors the element horizontally. Apply to a child text node to keep the label readable.
invertedsbolv, sbol-visualInverts symbol colours for use on dark backgrounds.
combinatorialwrapper div inside sbol-visualGroups alternative symbol options for one design slot.
SBOL Visual CSS by Edinburgh Genome Foundry. GitHub repository
